nav.footerNote: Pages 1, 2, 4 live · others in later phases

safety.writeEnabledMessage: Warning: control write is enabled — this violates the advisory boundary.
safety.advisoryMessage: Advisory mode ({{mode}}). This system does not write to plant controls; all actions require operator approval and are recorded for audit.

synthetic.label: Synthetic
synthetic.title: Synthetic data — generated, not from live plant instruments.

simulated.label: Simulated
simulated.title: Model simulation output — not validated against plant.

estimated.label: Estimated
estimated.title: Illustrative estimate on synthetic pilot data — not a validated saving or guaranteed outcome.

vendor_specified.label: Vendor-Specified
vendor_specified.title: From an OEM datasheet, pump curve, or membrane projection — authoritative for design intent only, never for current condition.

customer_supplied.label: Customer-Supplied
customer_supplied.title: From a customer document, drawing, or design basis — trusted as a claim, unverified against the plant.

customer_measured.label: Customer-Measured
customer_measured.title: From a customer historian, LIMS, or instrument export — real data, still subject to sensor-confidence scoring.

recommendation.advisoryOnly: Advisory only — no control write is issued.
recommendation.roleGate: Approving or rejecting requires the <1>operator</1> role.

pumpCurve.unavailable: No pump curve available for this asset type.
pumpCurve.caption: Operating point vs best-efficiency point (BEP)

scenarios.roleGateTitle: Requires the engineer role to run what-if scenarios
scenarios.roleGate: Running what-if scenarios requires the <1>engineer</1> role.
scenarios.notActive: Simulation services connect in a later phase; showing baseline live data.

baseline.label: Baseline
baseline.description: Nominal operating conditions from the live twin.

peak_demand.label: Peak Demand
peak_demand.description: Higher product-water demand profile (simulation, later phase).

energy_saver.label: Energy Saver
energy_saver.description: Minimize specific energy within limits (simulation, later phase).

auth.loginPrompt: Sign in with your operator identity to access the advisory console. All actions are read-only with respect to plant control and are recorded in the audit trail.

process.title: Process Twin
process.context: Select a stage to inspect; click an asset to open its twin.
process.noStageAssets: No instrumented assets at this stage.

picker.title: Select an asset
picker.help: Choose an asset to open its twin, or click one from the Process Twin.

asset.noTelemetry: No live telemetry for this asset.
asset.noRul: No RUL estimate for this asset.
asset.noFailureProbability: No failure-probability estimate for this asset.
asset.envelopeHelp: Fraction of observed duty ({{samples}} samples) spent in each regime. Time away from BEP accelerates wear.
asset.noRecommendations: No recommendations yet. Use “Ask S3M” to request an advisory analysis.

simulation.title: Simulation Center
simulation.cardTitle: Simulation services connect in a later phase
simulation.body1: The Simulation Center is enabled in Phases 8–9. Scenario runs, what-if comparisons, and simulated outputs will appear here once the simulation services are wired in. Until then, the dashboard shows live baseline data from the WaterTwin API.
simulation.body2: You can preview the scenario selector below; selections are UI intent only and do not yet drive a simulation.

waterQuality.title: Water Quality Intelligence
waterQuality.context: Advisory water-quality analytics. Forecasts and scaling/fouling/boron risks are <1>preliminary</1> engineering estimates with uncertainty — not validated production predictions or guaranteed compliance.
waterQuality.treatmentRemoval: Treatment Removal — current vs design vs predicted
waterQuality.forecastsHelp: Preliminary physics/trend estimates with uncertainty bounds (lower–upper). Horizons: 1h · shift · 24h · 7d.
waterQuality.alertsHelp: Every alert requires operator approval and issues no control write.

predictiveMaintenance.title: Predictive Maintenance
predictiveMaintenance.context: Risk-ranked equipment & membrane intelligence · advisory only
predictiveMaintenance.disclaimer: Remaining-useful-life, failure probability and avoided-cost are <1>preliminary</1> engineering estimates with uncertainty — not validated or guaranteed. All actions require operator approval; no control write is issued.
predictiveMaintenance.noRoutedCard: No routed recommendation card for this asset yet.
predictiveMaintenance.selectRow: Select an asset row to see its PdM detail and recommendation.

energy.title: Energy Optimization
energy.context: Constrained RO specific-energy optimization (advisory). Optimal setpoint and savings are <1>ESTIMATED</1> and preliminary on a synthetic basis — not validated savings. No control write is issued; setpoints require operator action.
energy.optimizeResult: Optimizer: optimal pressure <1>{{pressure}} bar</1> @ recovery <3>{{recovery}}%</3> → <5>{{sec}} kWh/m³</5> (from {{baseline}}). Constraints respected: {{respected}}.

resilience.title: Resilience Command
resilience.context: Grid-outage resilience & generator command (advisory). Generator start probability, fuel endurance and service-continuity duration are <1>preliminary</1> estimates on synthetic data — not guaranteed availability or run-time. Any recommendation requires operator approval; no control write is issued.
resilience.scenarioBody: Assess generator readiness, load-shed order, service continuity and asset criticality under a total grid loss. Read-only what-if only.
resilience.loadShedBody: Loads are shed lowest-priority first so the HP pump + essential loads are kept last. Retained load {{retained}} kW of {{total}} kW; critical loads sustained: {{sustained}}.

executive.title: Executive Value / ROI
executive.context: Aggregated value across the platform layers (advisory). Every figure is <1>ESTIMATED</1> and preliminary.
executive.defaultDisclaimer: Illustrative estimates on synthetic pilot data — not validated savings or guaranteed outcomes.
executive.basisBody: Each benefit aggregates ESTIMATED outputs from an existing layer; no new physics is introduced. These are illustrative figures on synthetic pilot data, not validated savings.

assistant.title: Operations Assistant
assistant.context: Ask about anything the platform computes. Every answer is <1>grounded</1> in platform data + retrieved documents (never general model knowledge) and shows exactly what was used. Advisory / read-only — any recommended action requires operator approval; no control write is issued.
assistant.engineLocalTitle: S3M-Core quad-engine unreachable — grounded local fallback used.
assistant.engineQuadTitle: Answer orchestrated by the S3M-Core quad-engine.
assistant.error: Could not reach the assistant. Please try again.
assistant.answerNote: Read-only advisory answer — grounded in platform data + documents, not general model knowledge.
assistant.empty: Ask a question or pick an example prompt to get a grounded, evidence-backed answer.
